title: BEM-540 task3 provider telegram
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540')
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
provider = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
cycle='bem540-full-system-autotest'

# Provider failover synthetic: Claude cancelled/failed -> GPT reserve.
failover_record={
 'record_type':'provider_failover_system_test',
 'cycle_id':cycle,
 'source':'internal',
 'provider':'claude',
 'signal':'failed',
 'decision':'switch_to_gpt_reserve',
 'selected_provider':'gpt',
 'reserve_used':True,
 'switch_reason':'claude_failed',
 'status':'completed',
 'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem540/provider_failover_decision.json',
 'commit_sha':None,
 'blocker':None,
 'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'provider_failover_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(failover_record, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

provider['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)'
provider['last_provider']='claude'
provider['selected_provider']='gpt'
provider['last_status']='failed'
provider['last_switch_reason']='claude_failed'
provider['blocker']=None
hist=provider.get('switch_history',[])
if not isinstance(hist,list): hist=[hist]
hist.append({'cycle_id':cycle,'from':'claude','to':'gpt','reason':'claude_failed','at':'2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)','test':'BEM-540'})
provider['switch_history']=hist
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# Telegram canonical outbox synthetic message. No token/secrets.
message='BEM-540 SYSTEM TEST | 2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3) | internal cycle PASS | provider failover claude_failed->gpt PASS | telegram outbox synthetic PASS | blocker=null'
outbox_record={
 'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report',
 'cycle_id':cycle,
 'delivery_mode':'curator-hourly-report.yml_schedule_to_outbox_then_sender',
 'canonical':True,
 'status':'queued_for_sender',
 'message':message,
 'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None,
 'security':'no token in file; runtime sender secret only'
}
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(outbox_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(failover_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps({**outbox_record,'record_type':'telegram_outbox_system_test','artifact_path':'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl','commit_sha':None}, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

role_state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id']=cycle
role_state['curator_status']='REPORTING'
role_state['active_role']='curator'
role_state['next_role']='final_audit'
role_state['current_task']={'id':'BEM-540.3','title':'Provider failover + Telegram outbox synthetic system check','status':'completed'}
role_state['blocker']=None
rh=role_state.get('history',[])
if not isinstance(rh,list): rh=[rh]
rh.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-540 Task 3 provider failover and telegram outbox synthetic check','status':'PASS'})
role_state['history']=rh
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report=reports/'bem540_task3_provider_telegram_check.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-540 Task 3 | Provider Failover + Telegram Outbox Synthetic Check | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:05 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Synthetic provider failover: Claude failed -> GPT reserve.\n- provider_contour_state.json updated.\n- Canonical Telegram outbox payload appended to governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl.\n- No live Telegram API. No token/secrets in files.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof=proofs/'bem540_task3_provider_telegram_check.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-540 Task 3 PASS: provider failover and Telegram outbox synthetic check completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(base/'provider_failover_decision.json'),str(provider_state_path),str(outbox),str(transport),str(role_state_path),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-540 Task 3 provider failover and Telegram outbox synthetic check completed')
"""
No issue comments.
